UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION

Current Report Pursuant to Section 13 or 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act.

ITEM 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition

On the date of this report, the Company announced its financial results for the fiscal quarter. Total net sales and operating income for the quarter are described in the press release furnished as an exhibit. The information in this item is being furnished and shall not be deemed filed for purposes of the Exchange Act.

ITEM 5.02 Departure of Directors or Certain Officers; Election of Directors; Appointment of Certain Officers

Effective at the close of business on the date of this report, a member of the Board of Directors notified the Company of a decision to retire. The departure was not the result of any disagreement with the Company on any matter relating to its operations, policies, or practices.

ITEM 9.01 Financial Statements and Exhibits

The following exhibit is furnished with this report: a press release announcing the Company's results of operations for the quarter. The exhibit is incorporated herein by reference.
